steps.title: Track signal honesty
steps.content: The text says saturated color is usually an honest fitness signal because carotenoids create the color and provide health benefits. Some tanagers can create the appearance of deep saturation with feather microstructures instead.

steps.title: Reject unsupported conclusions
steps.content: Choice A reverses the point by calling the signal honest without carotenoids. Choice B discusses signal effectiveness, which is not tested. Choice C shifts to mate preference, which is not the issue. The finding supports the possibility of a dishonest fitness signal. The answer is D.
